anchor_provenance.definition: alpha_em^-1(m_Z^2; P) from the OPH one-loop RG run from the OPH unification scale (paper_math.build_d10_from_p)

citations: PDG 2024 Review, Electroweak model and constraints

verdict.route_A_detail: filling delta_scheme requires the measured hadronic running (empirical class, already carried by the payload) or the OPH source hadronic spectral measure
verdict.route_B_detail: the OPH anchor is a one-loop unification value with a physical, understood hadronic and higher-order running deficit; it is not scheme-exact, and the gap is not a source-chain failure
verdict.source_only_reduction: a source-only anchor bridge reduces to the OPH hadronic spectral measure, which is blocked on the hadron backend (#425)
verdict.gap_consistency: the standard reference deficit 0.631 sits at the lower edge of the certified interval, confirming the gap is the hadronic-plus-higher-order running deficit rather than an anchor error
